triggers.value: (?i)\b(focus session|pomodoro|25 minute focus|start a focus sprint|deep work session)\b

output_template: [SCENE] work focus on, 25m timer started, music playing, DND on — pomodoro running.

metadata.natural_language_intent: Focus session (Pomodoro): work focus profile, 25-minute timer, resume music, do-not-disturb on. Combines focus + clock + media + device_settings.
example_queries: begin a 25 minute deep work session

triggers.value: (?i)\b(set up my morning|morning alarm routine|wake me and clear focus|morning routine)\b

output_template: [SCENE] 7am alarm set, focus cleared, media paused — good night.

metadata.natural_language_intent: Morning alarm routine: set a 7am alarm, clear focus, pause media. Combines clock + focus + media.
example_queries: set up my morning alarm routine
wake me at 7 and clear focus

triggers.value: (?i)\b(good ?night|bedtime|going to bed|time for bed|i'?m going to sleep)\b

output_template: [SCENE] lights off, 7am alarm set, sleep focus on, media paused — sleep well.

metadata.natural_language_intent: Goodnight: turn off the bedroom lights, set a 7am alarm, enable sleep focus, pause media. Combines home_assistant + clock + focus + media.

triggers.value: (?i)\b(look up .* and call|find .* in contacts and (call|phone|dial)|call my contact)\b

metadata.natural_language_intent: Look up a contact by name then place the call. Combines contacts + call (name -> number -> dial).
example_queries: look up John in contacts and call him
find Mom in my contacts and dial her

triggers.value: (?i)\b(i'?m leaving( home)?|leaving the house|heading out|leave home mode|going out)\b

output_template: [SCENE] lights off, bluetooth off, media paused — see you later.

metadata.natural_language_intent: Leave-home: turn off lights, disable bluetooth, pause media. Combines home_assistant + device_settings + media.

triggers.value: (?i)\b(download .* and play|grab the audio .* and play it|download this (song|track|video) and play)\b

intent_verbs: grab the audio and play it

metadata.natural_language_intent: Download the audio from a YouTube URL then start media playback. Combines youtube + media.
example_queries: download the audio from this and play it https://youtu.be/abc123
grab this track and play it https://youtu.be/abc123
download this song and play https://youtu.be/abc123
